package rulefixtures

// scenario for waitgroup_add_inside_loop: `for { wg.Add(1); go func() { ... wg.Done() }() }` where `wg.Add` could be called once before the loop with the count
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule693PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario693Positive(records []Rule693PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
